created='2026-05-24 | 10:19 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'

elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 repair missing Claude runtime state after BEM-843','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify Claude runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry real Claude response after BEM-843','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real Claude response'

    status='unknown_bem843_state'
    next_action='manual inspect BEM-843 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'bem843_status':status_in,'bem843_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_execute_after_bem843.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute After BEM-843 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_after_bem843.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
